MS920 charge resistor. From VBUS (5V) through R3 to battery. I_charge = (5V - 3.1V) / 2.2k ≈ 0.86mA (~0.08C). See Seiko datasheet for recommended charge method.

Red channel (2 LEDs ganged parallel at 5mA each = 10mA). At 3.0V VBAT: (3.0-2.0)/0.010=100Ω.
Yellow-green channel (2 LEDs ganged). At 3.0V: (3.0-2.2)/0.010=80Ω, use 82Ω E12. May dim below 2.8V battery.
BeCu leaf spring, gold/nickel plated. Presses against MS920SE + solder tab. 1.0mm nominal height (0.75-1.25mm range). SMD reflow.
Same part as SP1. Presses against MS920SE - solder tab.
Same part as SP1. Motor + wire presses against spring when signet housing closes.
Same part as SP1. Motor - wire presses against spring when signet housing closes.
nRF52832. Chip antenna + tuning strip (~6.5mm). Tiny no-GND zone. Proven at ring-scale PCBs (250m range on 46x8mm board). FCC/IC/CE certified. Replaces ISP1807.
Out of stock everywhere. Mouser has 19.9k on order. No alternative for Qvar+IMU combo.
11mAh 3.0V rechargeable Li-MnO2. SMD solder tab. ~3.5 day battery life at 0.13mA avg. Charge via resistor-limited current from VBUS. Fits ring envelope trivially (9.5mm dia).
Low current variant: 35mA max rated, 50mA starting. 0.25Grms vibration. Wire leads press against SP3/SP4 spring contacts when signet housing closes. Self-adhesive tape included.
